title: cristinajacks0n.github.io
text: Hi! I am Cristina Jackson, an undergraduate student at UC Santa Barbara studying Economics and Environmental Studies. I am from San Francisco and have so much love for my home, California. I love learning and have been really passionate about learning how to code and building this website! I love building and creating things—whether it’s a well-run event, a tight-knit team, or a killer spreadsheet and data plot! When not in school, you can find me running along the bluffs by Devereux Beach or sailing with my team in the Santa Barbara Harbor! I love the outdoors and have a great appreciation for nature and the world around me. I have coached at the Chautauqua sailing center for the past few summers and work at a doctors office in Santa Barbara. I have administration experience having worked at the St. Francis Yacht Club helping run races in the San Francisco Bay.
